title: hypericum alpinum var. alpigenum
intro: Hypericum alpinum var. alpigenum is a plant species within the St. John's Wort family, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and mild depression due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Hypericum alpinum var. alpigenum include its ability to improve mood, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant often come in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support mental health and well-being.
